title: Fee Sponsorship
description: Fee sponsorship lets one party help another transaction confirm without directly modifying the original spend. It is part of a broader package-relay design space for contract reliability.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Fee Sourcing
resources.notes: Related techniques for externalizing fees and improving reliability.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Package Relay
resources.notes: Relay-level mechanics required by sponsorship patterns.
